articles.title: Stock markets surge tracking global rally, drop in oil prices as U.S., Iran reach peace deal
articles.description: Stock markets soar as Sensex and Nifty rise, driven by a global rally and declining oil prices following U.S.-Iran peace deal.

articles.title: US Stock Market: Fed meeting in focus as Wall Street navigates volatility amid evolving US-Iran peace deal
articles.description: After months of gains, U.S. markets enter a pivotal week as investors assess the Federal Reserves upcoming policy decision amid persistent inflation concerns and Middle East developments. Falling oil prices and shifting rate expectations are adding complexity, while markets await signals on monetary policy and Wall Streets next direction.

articles.title: Petrol, diesel prices to be reviewed based on crude oil supply, says Union Minister Suresh Gopi
articles.description: Petrol and diesel prices in India witnessed a series of hikes in May 2026.

articles.title: Stock Markets Surge Tracking Global Rally, Drop in Oil Prices
articles.description: The 30-share BSE Sensex jumped 1,112.70 points to 76,648.74 in early deals. The 50-share NSE Nifty surged 335.55 points to 23,956.40

articles.title: Energy experts warn of slow oil and gas supply recovery after Iran deal
articles.description: High oil and gas prices and energy supply problems won't be solved overnight, despite Sunday's agreement to end the Iran war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: E20 vs E85: Which is actually cheaper per kilometre?
articles.description: E85 may be nearly Rs 20 per litre cheaper than petrol, but does that actually make it cheaper to run? The answer depends on one crucial factor: fuel efficiency.

articles.title: Hormuz reopening to ease India’s energy worries, cut oil import costs and inflation pressure
articles.description: Crude oil prices declined on Sunday after US President Trump said Washington had reached a ceasefire deal with Iran that would allow the 'toll free' passage of vessels through the Strait of Hormuz

articles.title: IndiGo, HPCL, MRF Among 10 Stocks That Jumped Up To 7% As Iran-US Deal Sent Crude Oil Prices Lower
articles.description: IndiGo, SpiceJet, IOC, HPCL, BPCL, MRF and other stocks gain up to 7% after oil prices slumped following Iran-US peace deal, boosting hopes of lower fuel costs and strong earnings.

articles.title: Sensex jumps 1,100 points, Nifty near 24,000: Why is stock market rising today?
articles.description: Indian equities rallied after signs of a US-Iran deal eased tensions and oil prices slid. The move improved the outlook for inflation, the rupee and near-term market flows.

articles.title: Oil Prices Sink Over 5% As US-Iran Peace Deal Sparks Supply Hopes; Will Cheaper Crude Bring Relief?
articles.description: Prices of crude oil fell by more than 5% on account of movement towards a peace agreement between the United States and Iran as well as the opening up of the Strait of Hormuz. Here's why crude is falling and what it means for India.
